title: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Child Center offers comprehensive mental health assessments for individuals experiencing difficulties at home, school, or in the workplace. Additional assessments may screen for substance abuse, trauma, medical health, risk of harm, and diagnostics. Upon completion, clients may recieve mental health diagnosis, service plan with treatment goals, recommendations for level of care, and wellness referrals. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 726-1465 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 726-1465 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and appointment FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan (Medicaid) and most private insurance plans. Need-based scholarships may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Mental Health Evaluation * Adolescents Mental Health Evaluation * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE PROBLEM SOLVING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WELLNESS AND COMMUNITY HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE SCHOOL AND COMMUNITY BASED PROGRAMS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH
